overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a foggy industrial district. The player character walks along streets and under industrial overpasses with orange sodium-vapor street lighting, passing pedestrians and vehicles while receiving a phone call from an NPC named Regina Jones.

events.description: player passes the pedestrian who was walking ahead, who then moves to the right side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk following an NPC pedestrian in an industrial district

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead of player on the sidewalk, then stepping aside to let player pass

entered.detail: large concrete industrial building with metal roll-up doors and graffiti
crisscrossing electrical wires spanning the street above
tall street lamp emitting warm orange sodium vapor light
concrete wall covered in colorful spray paint tags and street art

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a concrete sidewalk next to an industrial warehouse building covered in graffiti. Overhead power lines crisscross the foggy night sky. The player follows an NPC pedestrian who eventually moves aside, allowing the player to pass by parked cars on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with view of downtown skyscrapers

events.description: turns right at intersection, moving from enclosed sidewalk to open street with view of distant skyscrapers
phone call UI from Regina Jones appears on left side of screen

agents.ego_description: turning right at the intersection and continuing down the street while receiving a phone call notification

notable_agents.action: car with headlights on driving past the player on the right side of the street

entered.detail: two-story beige office building with multiple windows and a fenced area
massive futuristic corporate tower with illuminated windows and red lighting accents visible through fog
elevated industrial walkway or pipe structure spanning across the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The player turns right at an intersection, transitioning from the enclosed warehouse sidewalk to a more open street with a view of a massive illuminated skyscraper in the distance. A phone call notification from Regina Jones appears on the screen. Vehicles pass by on the right as the player continues walking toward an industrial overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial overpass corridor with overhead pipes

events.description: enters area beneath large industrial overpass and pipe structures, becoming more enclosed

agents.ego_description: walking steadily beneath industrial overpasses through an increasingly enclosed corridor

entered.detail: massive network of industrial pipes and metal walkways spanning overhead
orange and white striped construction barriers near the building edge
tall plain concrete wall running along the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: The player enters a more enclosed industrial zone beneath massive overhead pipe structures and walkways. The space becomes semi-covered with the sky mostly blocked by infrastructure. The street is empty of pedestrians and vehicles, with metal barriers visible on the left and a plain concrete wall on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow industrial alley with overhead pipe corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow industrial corridor with graffiti-covered walls and overhead pipes

entered.detail: dense network of large industrial pipes and conduits forming a ceiling over the narrow street
wall completely covered in layered graffiti tags and street art in various colors
large yellow shipping container or industrial storage unit

segments.scene_description: The player continues through a narrow industrial alleyway completely enclosed by overhead pipe structures forming a metal corridor. The left wall is densely covered in graffiti, while industrial containers and buildings line the right. The atmosphere is claustrophobic and deserted, with distant lights visible at the end of the passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a foggy industrial district that shifts from open city sidewalks into a claustrophobic network of overhead pipes. It begins along a concrete sidewalk beside a graffiti-covered warehouse, moving past a pedestrian and parked cars under a crisscross of power lines. As the camera turns right at an intersection, the view opens up to reveal a massive illuminated skyscraper in the distance while a phone call notification from Regina Jones appears on screen. The scene then shifts toward an industrial overpass, transitioning into a semi-covered zone where the sky is blocked by massive pipe structures and walkways. Finally, the path narrows into a deserted metal corridor enclosed by overhead infrastructure and graffiti-lined walls, leading toward distant lights at the end of the alleyway.
